segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: There's this. I have a little news that I'd like to give you as well and it has to do with this program.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: I have been absolutely delighted for the last five years to be working with some of the most talented people in television news.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Just really stellar, stellar producers, writers, researchers, reporters, just remarkable people here at CNN.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: And so it is really tough to tell you that I'm going to be leaving.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: kind of. It's sort of weird, but I'm going to leave this time slot at 12 noon, and I'm

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: going to make the jump and follow my friends over at HLN. We've already heard that

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Michaela Perera has jumped over there, Erica Hills over there, Robin Need. So I'm going

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: to jump over to Primetime on HLN 8 PM in the fall. Super excited to do it. We're going

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: to bring a really unique brand of social and legal issues oriented programming to that

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: eight p.m. spot. Lots more news and details about it will follow, but I just wanted to let

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: you know what a privilege it's been at 12 noon to be with you every day. And if you

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: will just indulge me for a moment, you see me all the time, but you don't see Christina

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: or Sanya or Lindsay or Robin or Chris or Scotty or Gus and Alex and Ariel and Lamy and

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Tandu and Dave. This is my family. And every single day it is a delight to get up at 430

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: in the morning and be with them and I say that honestly. So thank you for being here

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: at 12 noon every day. Still going to be here for a few more weeks from the 23rd it will

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: be our last program here but I'll be seeing you over on HLN at 8 p.m. very exciting time

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: for us all here at CNN and HLN and I will still be doing a lot of stuff on CNN as well.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: I'll be bringing legal analysis and I'll be guest representing and talking about the

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: the stories of the day, the justice oriented issues of the day over here on CNN's programming.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: So I'm not going very far and I'll still be working with all of these extraordinary people

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: on a pretty regular basis.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: For now, that's it for today.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: I've said enough.
